## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ServerCrash;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ServerCrash { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
cloud, storage, problem, error

## Categories
development, devices
